title: Steve Chair
body:
This mod adds a Steve Chair to the game. The chair looks like Minecraft Steve while still being chair shaped. 

The mod is based on images tweeted by the Mojang twitter account.

![A screenshot of the Mojang tweet this mod is based on](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51304da69c93cdc546eeed014f848d381b5fc5cb_0.webp)
